summary: Homepage performance remains persistently below 85 (score 74, LCP 6.5 s) with no structural fix applied; /about is still a near-blank placeholder with stub text only and SEO 83 below threshold. Project pages are visually intact but /projects performance dropped materially to 82 (from 92).

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 73 → 74 (+1 pt, within jitter — still persistently below 85)
/ lcp_ms 6082 → 6467 (+385 ms, worsening — still critically slow above 6 s)
/projects performance 92 → 82 (-10 pts, material regression — now below 85)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.5 s, performance score 74, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this remains the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance 74 (LCP 6.5 s) persistent regression; /projects dropped to 82; /about still empty placeholder with SEO 83
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains critically slow — persistent, unresolved

The homepage (`/`) scored **74** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-16), with LCP at **6,467 ms** — slightly worse than yesterday. The score has now been below 85 for many consecutive audits with no structural fix applied.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 74 | +1 pt (within jitter — still persistently below 85) |
| LCP | 6,467 ms | +385 ms (worsening — still critically slow above 6 s) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 179 ms | -19 ms (within jitter) |

## NEW: /projects performance dropped to 82 — below 85 threshold

`/projects` fell from **92 → 82** (-10 pts), now below the 85 threshold. LCP also increased by ~780 ms to 3,773 ms. This is a new regression worth investigating.

| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 82 | -10 pts (regression — below 85) |
| LCP | 3,773 ms | +779 ms |

## Still open — `/about`
- `/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text only, no nav or footer); SEO score **83**, below the 85 threshold — unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

## Project detail pages — near-threshold
- `/projects/note-structurer` performance **87** (-4 pts, within jitter — still above 85).
- `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` performance **85** (-6 pts, now at the threshold — watch closely).

### Suggested fixes (priority order)
1. **`/` hero LCP**: Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts.
2. **`/projects` regression**: Investigate what changed since yesterday — check for newly added images or third-party scripts on the projects index page.
3. **`/about` placeholder**: Build out the About page with real content, nav, and footer to resolve the SEO score and the placeholder breakage.
